title: Kaina - Surugajô Gozenjiai
description:
An anthology based around a tournament exceptionally fought with real swords held by Tokugawa Tadanaga in 1629. Based on Norio Nanjôs 1964 novel of the same name, which also inspired Takayuki Yamaguchi's manga Shigurui.
Translation and lettering: kurkku
Redraws on chapter 2: Waffleswall
author: Nanjô Norio
